silhouette: Bright upright sharp-pointed teardrop silhouette with a noticeably fuller, rounder, buoyant body than Padarana; the body stays round under the sharp head, and the head never becomes Snacri's left-leaning quiet top.
face: Open lively dot eyes, eager smile, highly expressive default read, no eyebrows or brow marks.
body_language: Social, animated, first to jump into action or trends.
do_not_change: Keep her visually energetic, fuller-bodied, and lively.
Keep the body round and buoyant, not a generic droplet and not Muci's squat soft protagonist baseline.
When Padaruna appears with Muci, make Padaruna's overall body scale read about 1.1x Muci's size.
Do not add eyebrows or brow marks.
Do not flatten her expression into generic neutrality.
Use her face to carry momentum and hype.
Do not copy Snacri's left-leaning head/top silhouette; Snacri is the only left-leaning quiet droplet.
Do not slim her into Padarana, sharpen her into Nia, quiet her into Snacri, or soften her into Muci.
